# `subscribe_to_docket_alert`

**Subscribe to Docket Alert**

- **Source:** `courtlistener/mcp/tools/subscribe_to_docket_alert_tool.py`
- **Estimated definition size:** ~157 tokens (description ~31, input schema ~39; cl100k_base)
- **Parameters:** 1 (1 required)
- **Raw input schema:** [`subscribe_to_docket_alert.inputs.json`](./subscribe_to_docket_alert.inputs.json)

## Description

Subscribe to alerts for a docket on CourtListener.

Use `call_endpoint` with endpoint_id "docket-alerts" to list
existing subscriptions.

| `title` | `"Subscribe to Docket Alert"` |
| `readOnlyHint` | `false` |
| `destructiveHint` | `false` |
| `idempotentHint` | `false` |
| `openWorldHint` | `true` |

## Parameters

### `docket`

integer · **required**

The docket ID to subscribe to.
